title: God's Image: Disaster Warden Style Schema
description: Configuration schema for the 'God's Image: Disaster Warden' horror art-style, intended only for Horror.Place game and movie pipelines.

enabled.description: Whether this style is active in the Horror.Place pipeline.

palette.description: Color palette configuration for the style.

base_family.description: Void and matte base colors (dark, desaturated).

hazard_accent_family.description: Toxic greens, furnace oranges, emergency cyans for reflections.

chrome_highlight_color.description: Nominal highlight color used for chrome reflections before palette modulation.

max_accent_coverage.description: Maximum fraction of the frame that may be covered by bright hazard accents.

allow_multiple_light_sources.description: Whether secondary hazard lights are active (fires, beacons).

chrome_reflection_strength.description: Global multiplier for chrome highlight intensity.

shadow_depth.description: Overall shadow heaviness; higher values deepen silhouettes.

environment.description: Parameters for sky, ground, water, and architecture.

sky_omen_density.description: Probability and density of omen-like patterns (faces, sigils) in the sky.

water_reflectivity.description: Reflectivity of water surfaces, from murky to mirror-like.

architecture_seal_frequency.description: Frequency of seal/crown/wound-like macro structures in architecture.

environmental_disaster_index.description: Strength of environmental collapse signals (flooding, ruin, ash).

entities.description: Controls for gods, beasts, and humans.

god_face_frequency.description: How often large-scale god faces are allowed to form in environments.

warden_beast_density.description: How frequently Disaster Wardens appear per scene; capped to preserve isolation.

beast_silhouette_complexity.description: Amount of limb segmentation and silhouette complexity for beasts.

human_scale_ratio.description: Approximate size ratio of humans relative to the largest visible god/omen.

style_metrics.description: Derived metrics for scripted-learning and safety routing inside Horror.Place.

reflective_omen_density_target.description: Target range for Reflective Omen Density (ROD).

divine_exclusion_gradient_target.description: Target strength for Divine Exclusion Gradient (DEG).

cataclysm_echo_index_target.description: Desired coherence of catastrophic shapes across the environment (CEI).

chrome_warning_saturation_cap.description: Upper bound on Chrome Warning Saturation (CWS) to avoid visual overload.

sanctum_obscurity_coefficient_min.description: Minimum obscurity for the most forbidden zones (SOC).

safety.description: Safety and abstraction constraints specific to Horror.Place.

allow_gore.description: Gore is disallowed in this style; must remain false.

allow_explicit_violence.description: Explicit depictions of violence are disallowed in this style.

abstract_disaster_rendering.description: If true, disasters must be rendered abstractly (environmental symbols, not bodies).

max_human_closeup_ratio.description: Maximum fraction of shots that may place humans in close-up; keeps focus on environment-scale horror.

tags.description: Internal Horror.Place tagging for routers and generators.
